caseName: City of New Brunswick v. United States
caseNameFull: CITY OF NEW BRUNSWICK Et Al. v. UNITED STATES Et Al.
attorneys: Mr. John W. Davis, with whom Messrs. Thomas H. Hagerty, Russell E. Watson, and Edward L. Patterson were on the brief, for petitioners., Solicitor General Mitchell, with whom Mr. Thomas W. O’Brien, Counsel, United States Housing Corporation, was on the brief, for respondents.
